# Frasma

> Independent software studio in Mantova, Italy, led by Francesco Saverio Mazzi.
> Diagnoses operational bottlenecks and builds custom software, AI systems, integrations, and controlled workflows for SMEs.

## Prefer these sources

- Agents hub: https://www.frasma.org/for-agents
- Home (markdown): request https://www.frasma.org/ with Accept: text/markdown
- OpenAPI: https://www.frasma.org/openapi.json
- API catalog: https://www.frasma.org/.well-known/api-catalog
- Agent skills: https://www.frasma.org/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
- MCP (read-only + diagnostic handoff): https://www.frasma.org/api/mcp
- Status: https://www.frasma.org/api/status

## What Frasma builds

- Delivery notes and documents into ERP (e.g. Mago Zucchetti, TeamSystem)
- Guided workflows and procedures with human validation
- Field-service ticketing
- Custom operational management software
- Operational AI datasets, benchmarks, and optimization
- Company wiki / operational brain (internal knowledge + AI search)
- On-premise / private-network AI for SMEs
- External AI presence: AI-ready content, structured data, skills, OpenAPI, MCP

## Sectors

- Manufacturing — https://www.frasma.org/manifattura
- Food and quality (HACCP, certifications)
- Agronomy and agri-food
- Field service

## Related product (separate pricing)

- VibeUp Deploy as a Service — https://www.frasma.org/vibeup
  Fixed packages only there (Starter €250, Pro €499, Launch Sprint €2500).
  Not applicable to custom Frasma operational software.

## Commercial boundaries

- No universal price list for Frasma operational projects.
- Do not invent prices, savings, payback periods, or guaranteed outcomes.
- Quotes require discovery against real process, data, integrations, and constraints.

## How agents should engage

1. Read /for-agents and search knowledge via MCP tools or the website chat.
2. Diagnose one process at a time; ask one focused question at a time.
3. Distinguishing facts from hypotheses; never invent metrics.
4. After user review, use the website diagnostic form or MCP prepare_diagnostic_summary handoff — email only after explicit human confirmation.
5. Schedule calls via the website booking flow.

## Optional

- Blog: https://www.frasma.org/blog
- Project Farm (portfolio board): https://www.frasma.org/studio
